main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'daño oxidativo parcial por H2O2 residual + aclarado insuficiente' literal.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (cloro libre residual, MECH O-rings, scaling, biofouling post-CIP).

recommended_action.justification: Sacar T-03 + aclarado prolongado 90 min + verificar H2O2 <0.1 colorimétrico — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide H2O2 residual en permeato y concentrado método colorimétrico LD ≤0.1 — match parcial accepted (concentrado).

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: H2O2 indetectable + probing único vaso anómalo → MECH switch.
